query:
SELECT DISTINCT
                link->>'source' as "source!",
                link->>'target' as "target!",
                link->>'relationship' as "relationship!"
            FROM knowledge_base,
                 jsonb_array_elements(metadata->'graph'->'links') AS link
            WHERE link->>'source' = ANY($1) OR link->>'target' = ANY($1)
            LIMIT 15
